mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_complex WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND complex_id = #{complexId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_complex WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND complex_id = #{complexId}

SELECT f.favorite_id, f.member_id, f.complex_id, f.created_at, a.complex_name, a.legal_dong, a.build_year, a.household_count, a.latitude, a.longitude FROM favorite_complex f JOIN apt_complex a ON f.complex_id = a.complex_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
